name: Kautilya Vidyalaya - Kanakadasa Nagar

address.Address: J Block, No 9, 1, 13th Main Rd, Kanakadasa Nagar, Dattagalli 3rd Stage, Mysuru, Karnataka 570023

address.streetAddress: J Block, No 9, 1, 13th Main Rd, Kanakadasa Nagar, Dattagalli 3rd Stage, Mysuru, Karnataka 570023

itemListElement.reviewBody: Definitely one of the best schools in the city.

As a teacher and parent of Kautilya Vidyalaya I am proud to say that it is one of the best CBSE schools in Mysore.

Kautilya has a very well planned and organised academic program which is aligned with NEP 2020..  Kautilya Vidyalaya  follows a progressive teaching methodology that encourages critical thinking, creativity, and experiential learning.

My child has been groomed very well with all the skills required for 21st Century  with a balanced mix of academics, arts, and sports.

In the last couple of years there have been many positive changes under the able leadership of Chairman shri. T Babu and Principal Smt. Sashikala V R..

The changes are really very good & keeping up with the changing needs of the world. I m very proud to be a part of this Kautilya team... Congratulations to this team for bringing and implementing them. All the best! Keep it up!

This school’s infrastructure is impressive with modern classrooms, well equipped labs , and a vast library. This school offers various clubs, sports and cultural events -helping to develop new interests.

Kautilya Vidyalaya School stands out as one of the best CBSE schools, offering an innovative, 21st-century education designed to meet the demands of a changing world. Its curriculum aligns with the New Education Policy (NEP), emphasizing both academic rigor and the development of essential life skills.

The school's commitment to holistic development is evident in its strong focus on co-curricular activities. From sports to arts, students are encouraged to explore their interests and talents, contributing to their overall growth. The school places particular importance on developing communication and social skills, ensuring students are prepared for the collaborative and globalized environment of the future.

To summarize, Kautilya Vidyalaya School provides an enriching, well-rounded education that balances academics with personal development, making it a top choice for parents seeking a modern, NEP-aligned institution.

Kautilya Vidyalaya is one of the best CBSE institution which focuses on academic excellence, 21st century skills and extracurricular activities including character development programs.

The infrastructure is well equipped with all the modern and excellent facilities for sports, arts as well as cultural activities. All these programs are covered under NEP aligned curriculum. This is one of the institution where students are encouraged to explore their talents and passion through their creative ideas. Development is through its diverse programs and events.

Altogether Kautilya Vidyalaya is an outstanding choice for parents to educate their children with a comprehensive education as well as communication and social skills.

I being a Teacher and a parent, appreciate the institution's method of tutoring students by involving and upgrading itself to the 21st century as it simultaneously inculcates the CBSE norms and NEP regulations.                  In addition to which it develops among the students, an accurate essense of curricular and co-curricular skills, ultimately focusing on their overall enhancement.

Kautilya Vidyalaya is the best school in Mysore. It's best in its own way.I would recommend this school whenever asked.
This school takes care of each child's overall development,be it academics, sports,co-curricular activities and competitions . Teacher's are well experienced and highly capable.
It has a wonderful reputation and has been maintaining it since it's inseption.
Feels great to be a part of Kautilya Vidyalaya for the last 15 years.

As both a parent and a teacher , I can confidently say that Kautilya Vidyalaya stands out as an exceptional CBSE school. The school's commitment to holistic education is evident in its well-rounded curriculum, which emphasizes academics, arts, and sports.

The dedicated faculty fosters a nurturing environment, encouraging critical thinking and creativity in students. Communication between teachers and parents is strong, ensuring that we are involved in our children’s progress.

Facilities are modern and well-maintained, supporting a variety of extracurricular activities that help develop essential life skills. Overall, Kautilya Vidyalaya cultivates not just knowledgeable students, but confident and responsible individuals, making it a top choice for education.

Kautilya Vidyalaya, a CBSE school, is known for its balanced approach to academics and extracurricular activities. The school fosters a strong educational foundation while promoting holistic development through various sports, arts, and cultural programs. Its experienced faculty and supportive environment make it a great choice for overall student growth.
